data.title: Bakkt Completes Acquisition of DTR to Enhance Digital Settlement Infrastructure
data.description: Digital asset company Bakkt has announced the completion of its acquisition of stablecoin infrastructure firm Distributed Technologies Research (DTR) through a stock transaction. According to Odaily, Bakkt issued over 11.3 million shares to DTR beneficiaries and may issue an additional 725,000 shares. Bakkt CEO Akshay Naheta stated that the deal aims to integrate Bakkt's institutional-grade infrastructure with DTR's native AI payment engine and stablecoin technology, creating a 24/7 digital settlement layer that serves as a crucial bridge between traditional financial systems and next-generation digital assets. Additionally, the company has been renamed Bakkt Inc. Previously, the project raised $48 million in February through a stock sale to address market uncertainties and potential delisting risks.

data.title: Paradigm transferred 2.14 million HYPE tokens to Coinbase over the past two days.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, Paradigm has transferred 2.14 million HYPE tokens (worth $86 million) to Coinbase Prime in the past two days.

data.title: MGBX will launch MEGA contracts.
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will launch the MEGAUSDT perpetual contract trading pair on May 1, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Trading opening time: May 1, 2026, 18:00 (SGT). Leverage: Maximum supported 50x.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches UnifAI Network (UAI) Airdrop
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X that UnifAI Network (UAI) is now available on Binance Alpha, offering users the opportunity to claim an airdrop of 95 UAI tokens. This initiative is accessible to users who possess at least 237 Binance Alpha Points, with the distribution operating on a first-come, first-served basis.

The airdrop event is structured to adjust the score threshold automatically, decreasing by 5 points every five minutes if the reward pool is not fully distributed. This dynamic approach aims to facilitate broader participation among users with varying point balances. Participants should be aware that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points from their accounts.

To secure their tokens, users must confirm their claim on the Alpha Events page within a 24-hour window. Failure to do so will result in forfeiting the opportunity to receive the airdrop. This requirement underscores the importance of timely action to benefit from the event. The airdrop represents a strategic effort by Binance Alpha to engage its community and reward active participation through innovative token distribution mechanisms.

data.title: a16z Crypto Unstaking Activity: 4,270 HYPE Unstaked, More Scheduled for Next Week
data.description: Arkham data reveals that a16z Crypto has recently unstaked 4,270 HYPE tokens. According to NS3.AI, an additional 30,000 HYPE tokens held by a16z Crypto are set to complete the unstaking process at approximately 20:31 UTC on May 4th next week. This activity highlights ongoing movements within the cryptocurrency market, as investors and firms manage their digital assets strategically.

data.title: Bakkt completes acquisition of stablecoin payments company Distributed Technologies Research
data.description: Digital asset company Bakkt announced the completion of its acquisition of stablecoin infrastructure company Distributed Technologies Research (DTR) through an equity transaction. Under the agreement, Bakkt issued over 11.3 million shares to DTR beneficial holders, with the potential issuance of approximately 725,000 additional shares. Bakkt CEO Akshay Naheta stated that the transaction aims to combine Bakkt's institutional-grade infrastructure with DTR's native AI payment engine and stablecoin technology to build a 24/7 digital settlement layer, providing a crucial bridge between the traditional financial system and next-generation digital assets. Furthermore, the company has been renamed Bakkt Inc. Previously, the project raised $48 million through a stock sale in February to address market uncertainty and potential delisting risks. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Trump Sons Involved in Merger with Kazakh Mineral Group
data.description:
Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump have reportedly merged a shell company with a key mineral group in Kazakhstan, according to ChainCatcher. The Financial Times reported that the Kazakh group received up to $1.6 billion in support from the U.S. government last year for developing tungsten mining projects.

The tungsten project involves the Katpar and Upper Kairakty deposits in northern Kazakhstan, with financing provided by institutions such as the U.S. Export-Import Bank. The Trump sons are expected to join the advisory board of the related company and hold shares by the end of 2024. The report suggests this is another instance of the Trump family's business empire being linked to U.S. government interests.

data.title: Trump's son merged with Kazakhstan's Key Minerals Group through a shell company. The latter had previously received $1.6 billion in government funding for tungsten mining.
data.description: Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump, the eldest sons of Donald Trump, have merged a shell company with a key mining group in Kazakhstan. This group received up to $1.6 billion in government funding last year for tungsten mining projects. The report indicates that the tungsten project involves the Katpar and Upper Kairakty deposits in northern Kazakhstan. The Export-Import Bank of the United States and other institutions have provided financing. Trump's sons will join the company's advisory board and hold shares by the end of 2024. (FT)

data.title: Arkham-Tagged Address Completes HYPE Unstaking and Transfers
data.description: An address tagged by Arkham as belonging to a16z has completed the unstaking of 4,270 HYPE tokens, according to Foresight News. Of these, 3,875 tokens were transferred to an address starting with 0xeeb. Additionally, the address is set to complete the unstaking of 30,000 HYPE tokens around 4 a.m. on May 5, UTC+8.

data.description: According to Arkham data, a16z Crypto has completed the unstaking of 4,270 HYPE tokens, transferring 3,875 of them to the address 0xeeb...533A. Additionally, another 30,000 HYPE tokens from a16z Crypto will be unstaking next week, on May 4th, at approximately 8:31 PM UTC.

data.title: HYPE Unstaking Activity: Significant Movements and Upcoming Completion
data.description: Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) has recently unstaked 4,270 HYPE tokens, while Kairos Research reported that 3,875 HYPE tokens have been transferred to a specific address. According to NS3.AI, approximately 30,000 additional HYPE tokens are currently in the unstaking process, with completion expected around 8:00 p.m. UTC on May 4.

data.title: Prediction Market Competition Intensifies with New Perpetual Contracts
data.description: Hyperliquid is entering the prediction market, joining Polymarket and Kalshi in launching perpetual contracts. According to PANews, these three platforms are competing to become the leading one-stop trading hub. The introduction of perpetual contracts is reshaping the prediction market landscape, with cross-margining and risk engines playing crucial roles. The question remains as to which platform's strategy will prevail in this competitive environment.

data.title: Coinpost Terminal Partners with RootData for Enhanced Investment Insights
data.description:
Japanese cryptocurrency media outlet Coinpost's AI platform, Coinpost Terminal, has entered into a partnership with Web3 asset data platform RootData. According to ChainCatcher, this collaboration aims to enhance Coinpost Terminal's business processes by leveraging RootData's comprehensive data. Through the RootData API, Coinpost Terminal will offer higher quality investment information and market intelligence to local investors, financial institutions, and media in Japan.

Coinpost, a subsidiary of SBI Group, provides a variety of services in a secure and compliant environment. The company is also actively involved in organizing high-level B2B events and expanding its presence in the Web3 ecosystem through large conferences such as WebX.

data.title: DEX-to-CEX Spot Ratio Rises Despite Decline in DEX Volume
data.description: ARK Invest reported that the ratio of decentralized exchange (DEX) to centralized exchange (CEX) spot trading increased to approximately 27.4% in the first quarter of 2026, despite a 26% drop in DEX spot volume to around $832 billion. According to NS3.AI, this shift occurred during a risk-off period, with CoinGlass data indicating a 22% decline in Bitcoin's value. Additionally, stablecoin swap volume experienced a slight increase of 0.7%, reaching approximately $185 billion, while tokenized asset swaps surged by about 83% to roughly $4.6 billion.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Gold Falls Below $4,600 per Ounce
data.description: Spot gold prices have dropped below $4,600 per ounce, marking a 0.47% decline for the day. According to Jin10, this decrease reflects ongoing volatility in the precious metals market.

data.title: a16z Crypto calls on the U.S. SEC to optimize the regulatory framework for prediction markets and resolve jurisdictional conflicts.
data.description: a16z Crypto recently submitted a comment letter to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) regarding a proposed Notice of Prediction Market Rulemaking (ANPRM). a16z Crypto stated that prediction markets are experiencing explosive growth, with Kalshi's average weekly trading volume increasing from $300 million to $3 billion. The agency emphasized that by combining AI, blockchain, and prediction markets, AI agents can leverage on-chain programmable infrastructure to automatically hedge business risks without human intervention, thereby building a robust information aggregation system. Addressing existing regulatory obstacles, a16z Crypto made several recommendations: reaffirming the SEC's exclusive jurisdiction over Designated Contract Markets (DCMs) to eliminate conflicts of state law; introducing a mechanism similar to the ISDA Decision Committee to optimize contract settlement; and utilizing the auditability of on-chain transactions to monitor insider trading. Furthermore, a16z Crypto urged the SEC to adjust its core principles to accommodate decentralized protocols, allowing prediction markets to fully utilize blockchain technology to reduce transaction costs and increase transparency.

data.title: a16z Crypto Advocates for Reform in Prediction Market Regulation
data.description:
The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is currently at a pivotal moment in reforming the regulatory framework for prediction markets, according to ChainCatcher. Miles Jennings, the Head of Policy and General Counsel at a16z Crypto, along with others, have highlighted the transition of prediction markets from niche products to essential infrastructure.

With the integration of AI and blockchain-driven risk management models, prediction markets can enable AI agents to automatically hedge risks, adjust on-chain event contract positions in real-time, and play a central role in risk management, information aggregation, and authenticity verification. a16z Crypto warns that overly conservative regulatory frameworks could hinder the growth potential of prediction markets. Consequently, they have submitted a comment letter addressing statutory core principles and the application of CFTC regulations in prediction markets, public interest considerations related to event contracts, and other critical issues.

The letter includes five regulatory recommendations for prediction markets: granting the CFTC unified regulatory authority over event contracts, optimizing contract dispute resolution mechanisms, enhancing monitoring of insider trading and market manipulation, revisiting 'special rules,' and exploring clearer compliance pathways for on-chain prediction markets.

data.title: UK Housing Market Shows Resilience Amid Rising Mortgage Rates
data.description: UK home values saw an unexpected increase in April, according to one of the country's largest lenders. Bloomberg posted on X that this suggests the housing market is showing resilience despite the ongoing Iran war, which has led to higher mortgage rates. The data indicates that the housing sector is managing to withstand external pressures, maintaining stability in the face of geopolitical tensions affecting financial conditions.

data.title: Capital One 360 Class-Action Settlement Approved for $425 Million
data.description: A federal judge has approved a $425 million settlement in a class-action lawsuit involving Capital One 360. According to NS3.AI, the settlement pertains to customers who held 360 Savings accounts between September 18, 2019, and June 16, 2025. Eligible customers are set to receive payments automatically on or around July 27, 2026, provided there are no appeals that delay the process.

data.title: UK April Nationwide House Price Index Rises 3% Year-on-Year
data.description: The Nationwide House Price Index in the United Kingdom increased by 3% year-on-year in April, surpassing the expected 2.20% and matching the previous value of 2.20%. According to Jin10, this data reflects a stronger-than-anticipated growth in the housing market for the period.
